text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I catch sight of Symboli Rudolf and
Narita Brian coaching some younger students
down at the track.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...That is the long and short of it. I would like
each of you to do your best to maintain the form
I've just taught you and achieve the full potential
of your leg strength.

text_block_list.name: Younger Students
text_block_list.text: Yes, ma'am!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Do I really need to be here?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... My textbook approach is boring you to
death, I'm sure. However, this is where you come
in.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Your attention, everyone. Next, I would like you
to try and experience running on pure instinct,
without a thought.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Brian here will act as your coach. Do your best,
everyone.

text_block_list.name: Younger Students
text_block_list.text: Yes ma'am!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hey. You do know that I don't know anything
about coaching, right?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that is perfectly all right. I would like you to
do it in your own way.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Fine. But I'm not responsible for what happens.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you lot... Just start out by running. At full
speed.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Huh—I mean—okay! Is there anything we should
keep in mind?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Forget about theory. I only want you to think
about one thing—don't show me a half-assed run.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Eek! R-roger that!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Hmph. I don't know the meaning of going easy.
Got that, Rudolf?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Raaargh!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what the?! Brian's comin' at us like a bat out
of hell!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
What's wrong?! Run! Give it everything you got!
It's do-or-die!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Eek! R-run away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The students scramble away from Narita Brian,
but to no avail. She runs them down with
ferocious speed, overtaking them like a predator
swallowing its prey.

text_block_list.name: Younger Students
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Groan...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Tch. I knew this would happen.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Not to worry. It's quite all right.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Listen up, everyone. By a show of hands, how
many of you ran according to the theory I
explained earlier?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Precisely. Of course you couldn't. A real race is
utter pandemonium—a torrent of animosity. In
such a circumstance, one would be hard-pressed
to put theory into practice.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
In order for our labors to bear fruit, we must first
find the fighting spirit within ourselves and be
resolute even in the face of adversity.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Our fighting spirit? You mean like what Brian just
showed us?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Just so. I had Brian kindly perform a
demonstration so you could all understand how
important that is first-hand within the confines of
training.

text_block_list.name: Younger Students
text_block_list.text: Wow! Thank you, Brian!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph. Put it to good use.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
For crying out loud... Looks like you had this all
planned out from the beginning. And the rest of
us are just dancing on your strings.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm afraid I have no idea what you mean. I
merely wished to teach them something of the
highest importance. In other words...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You have to get their hearts racing to get their
hearts in the race!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I'm outta here.
